Tecnicamente en 50% descubri el juego por esta imagen y estos parecidos.
"Core Theme: British * ”keepers” and tacticians from similar eras part of organizations formed of individuals capable of supernatural magic (St. Pavlov Foundation | Mythag University) dedicated to protecting the world from an otherworldly calamity capable of erasing people and events from history (The Storm | The Dissolution Event) which they’re uniquely able to resist. The people they command are shunned from society (Arcanists | Awakeners) and are based on history/literature.

It’s not confirmed that Keeper’s British or anything, but the story takes place in “Londinium”, it works for my agenda, and it’s funny so shhh"
